# TiMOS-B-26.3.R1 both/x86_64 Nokia 7750 SR-1
# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    router "Base" {
        interface "system" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.10.10.10
                    prefix-length 32
                }
            }
        }
        interface "to-pe1" {
            port 1/1/c1/1
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 172.16.10.0
                    prefix-length 31
                }
            }
        }
        isis 0 {
            admin-state enable
            level-capability 2
            area-address [49.0000]
            interface "system" {
                passive true
            }
            interface "to-pe1" {
                interface-type point-to-point
            }
        }
    }
}
